notes: Reviewed local snapshot for top1200 cheat-code uplift. Facts only, concise effect labels, no long copied prose.

cheatCodes.name: DK Mode
cheatCodes.code: Beat Runway on Agent in 5:00 or less

cheatCodes.name: Infinite ammo
cheatCodes.code: Beat Control on Secret Agent in 10:00 or less

cheatCodes.name: Invincibility
cheatCodes.code: Beat Facility on 00 Agent in 2:05 or less

cheatCodes.name: Golden Gun
cheatCodes.code: Complete Egyptian
cheatCodes.effect: Unlocks the Golden Gun in the cheat menu.

cheatCodes.name: Invincible
cheatCodes.code: Beat Area 51 - Escape on Agent in 3:50 or less

cheatCodes.name: Cloaking Device
cheatCodes.code: Beat G5 Building - Reconnaissance on Agent in 1:40 or less

cheatCodes.name: Unlimited Ammo
cheatCodes.code: Beat Pelagic II - Exploration on Special Agent in 7:07 or less

cheatCodes.name: All Guns in Solo
cheatCodes.code: Beat Skedar Ruins - Battle Shrine on Perfect Agent in 5:31 or less

cheatCodes.name: Restore Health
cheatCodes.code: Pause, then Left Left Down Down Square Square Triangle Square

cheatCodes.name: Unlock All Missions
cheatCodes.code: Mission Select: hold R2, then Left Left Down Down Square Square Triangle Square

cheatCodes.name: Choose Mission Layout
cheatCodes.code: Mission Select: hold R1, then Left Left Down Down Square Square Triangle Cross

cheatCodes.name: Carry 99 Items
cheatCodes.code: Item Select: hold L1, then Left Left Down Down Square Square Triangle Square

cheatCodes.name: Infinite lives
cheatCodes.code: CHEATLOTSOFGOESWITHMANYBANJOS

cheatCodes.name: Infinite air
cheatCodes.code: CHEATGIVETHEBEARLOTSOFAIR

cheatCodes.name: Infinite Eggs
cheatCodes.code: CHEATBANJOBEGSFORPLENTYOFEGGS

cheatCodes.name: Max energy bar
cheatCodes.code: CHEATANENERGYBARTOGETYOUFAR

cheatCodes.name: HONEYKING
cheatCodes.code: CHEATOHONEYKING

cheatCodes.name: NESTKING
cheatCodes.code: CHEATONESTKING

cheatCodes.name: JIGGYWIGGYSPECIAL
